notes: Modern Ionis patent. supporting_quote: Quantitation of Survivin mRNA levels was determined by real-time quantitative PCR using the ABI PRISM 7700 Sequence Detection System ... For human GAPDH the PCR primers were: forward primer: GAAGGTGAAGGTCGGAGTC (SEQ ID NO: 7) reverse primer: GAAGATGGTGATGGGATTTC (SEQ ID NO: 8) ... membranes were stripped and probed for human glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (GAPDH) RNA ... Data was normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls.
notes: Early Isis/Ionis patent (Survivin/BIRC5). Same standard Isis methodology: real-time quantitative PCR with multiplexed internal-standard GAPDH (human GAPDH primer-probe SEQ ID 7/8/9) for the primary screen; Northern blot normalized to GAPDH. NO RIBOGREEN (predates RiboGreen era). 'total RNA' = Northern-blot RNA-prep step only. 'actin' = decoys (actinomycin D in chemo-agent lists). used_actb=no.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real time RT-PCR are normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreenTM (Molecular Probes, Inc.
notes: Early-2000s Isis ASO family. Main dose-response/screening Tables come from quantitative real-time RT-PCR; patent states RT-PCR data normalized using EITHER GAPDH OR total RNA via RiboGreen, without committing to one (genuine boilerplate ambiguity, so basis=unknown). A separate set of Northern-blot examples (PHOSPHORIMAGER/IMAGEQUANT) is explicitly 'normalized to GAPDH levels in untreated controls'. No bDNA/QuantiGene. beta-actin/GAPDH otherwise only as decoy/boilerplate. ACTB NOT used as normalizer.
